action: In Visual Studio Code, right-click on the 'tests' folder in the Explorer pane (create the folder if it doesn't exist) and select 'New File'. Name the new file 'test_calculator_app.py'. Open this file in the editor pane.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer
